captions.00_instructions.png: Participant instructions for the two-phase speech/song judgment task.
captions.01_text_trial.png: Representative text-phase prose-to-lyrics trial with the 0-6 response scale.
captions.02_audio_trial.png: Representative audio-phase speech-to-song trial with identical repeated audio and the matched 0-6 response scale.
captions.03_completion.png: Completion page after the scripted participant flow finished all 15 text and 15 audio trials.
